/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/apexshot-capture_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/ScreenCapture.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/request.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/CaptureOverlay.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/CaptureOverlay_Drawing.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/CaptureOverlay_Events.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/CaptureOverlay_Scroll.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/CaptureOverlay_Webcam.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/CaptureOverlay_HitTest.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/CaptureOverlay_Window.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/RecordingControlsWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/ScrollControlPanel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/apexshot-capture.dir/src/WindowPickerOverlay.cpp.o" -o apexshot-capture  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5DBus.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5X11Extras.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libICE.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXtst.so -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.17
